sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n29352" key="duspara/gwgos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δυσπαράγωγος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾰγ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype></foreign>, <sense id="n29352.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">hard to mislead</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:8:10" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.10</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
